---
name: Backlog Item
about: Create a structured backlog item for implementation work
title: "[TASK] "
labels: ["backlog"]
assignees: []
---

## Goal

Describe the outcome this task should achieve.

## Context

Why is this needed? What business or technical context exists?

## Scope

What is included and what is explicitly excluded?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Related ADR

- ADR-XXXX

## Related Test Plan

- docs/tests/adr-XXXX-...

## Test Strategy

- Unit Tests:
- Integration Tests:
- Architecture Tests:
- Manual Verification:

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code implemented
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Ready for pull request
